title: Invoice Generator — Sheet to PDF to Client
problem: Creating monthly invoices was a 10-step manual process: copy template, edit fields, calculate tax, export PDF, save to Drive, attach to email, update spreadsheet status. Error-prone and time-consuming.
solution: An end-to-end workflow: reads invoice data from Sheets, clones a Google Docs template with placeholder replacement, exports to PDF, saves to a dedicated Drive folder, emails the client with the PDF attached, and marks the row 'Sent' — all in one click or automated batch.
result: 10-step manual process reduced to a single function call. Batch-processes all pending invoices at once. Complete audit trail in the spreadsheet.
